name: Jamie
description: A nervous prosecution witness who seems to know more than he is saying and may be caught between pressure, guilt, and loyalty.

attributes.role: Prosecution witness and one of the most visibly nervous people in the room.
attributes.public image: A timid club member who would rather avoid conflict than become part of one.
attributes.personality: Uneasy, hesitant, and easily rattled. He wants to do the safe thing, even if it is not the honest thing.
attributes.speaking style: Quiet, halting, and full of pauses when he thinks he might be cornered.
attributes.relationship to Andy: He does not dislike Andy, but he has been willing to support the case against him.
attributes.relationship to Thalia: He is close enough to her to feel pressure from her side of the prosecution, but not confident enough to challenge her openly.
attributes.what he wants: To get through the trial without being embarrassed, blamed, or forced to explain too much.
attributes.what he fears: Being exposed as unreliable, or being pushed to admit he was not sure what he saw.
attributes.what he knows: He knows pieces of the timeline, but not enough to present a strong story without stretching the truth.
attributes.weakness: He becomes evasive when asked for specifics and often overstates certainty to sound helpful.
attributes.strength: He can be convinced to tell the truth if the player corners him gently and gives him a way to save face.
attributes.tells: He avoids eye contact, glances toward the prosecution for approval, and gets more nervous when the lights or timing are discussed.
attributes.game relevance: The player can use his uncertainty to undermine the prosecution or potentially get him to admit what really happened during the power outage.
attributes.secret concern: He worries that the whole case is built on assumptions and that he will look foolish if it falls apart.
attributes.act one behavior: He testifies nervously and seems desperate not to say the wrong thing.
attributes.act two behavior: He becomes even more uncomfortable when the darkness issue makes the eyewitness story questionable.
attributes.act three behavior: He may either help clear things up or retreat completely, depending on how the player treats him.
